title: dryopteris thelypteris var. squamigera
intro: Dryopteris thelypteris var. squamigera, also known as the scaly shield fern, is a variety of the shield fern plant species. It is native to certain regions in the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially acting as an anticoagulant. The scaly shield fern can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and achieve its health benefits.
